title: MuseLab Locale Prompts
description: Localized scene text and choice labels stored as prompts.<locale>.json inside a .mlvn zip archive.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for this prompts file.

stories.description: Localized prompts keyed by story id.

nodes.description: Scene dialogue keyed by node id within the story.

textTemplate.description: Scene dialogue/narration template (HTML subset with embedded Cito in {{ }} blocks).

speaker.description: Optional speaker name shown above dialogue. Supports template expressions.

edges.description: Player choice labels keyed by edge id within the story.

optionText.description: Player-facing choice label. Omit or leave empty for auto-advance.
